name: Lead Tracker — Daily Digest → Slack
_purpose: Daily 9am ET. Pulls yesterday's lead activity from Airtable + computes today's totals. Posts a one-line stat block + a roll-up of new handoffs and orders to #leads.

parameters.text:
📊 *McKenzie daily digest — {{$json.yesterday}}*
• New handoffs: *{{$json.newHandoffs}}*
• New orders: *{{$json.newOrders}}*
• Yesterday revenue: *${{$json.newRevenue}}*

_All-time:_ {{$json.totalLeads}} leads · {{$json.totalOrders}} orders · {{$json.totalRevenueFmt}} revenue
